beats: Visitors follow a designated exit route
They place clean suits, shoe covers, and masks into a recycle bin

voiceover.speaker: Narrator
voiceover.text: 参观结束后，请按指定路线离开洁净车间。洁净服、鞋套、口罩等按现场要求回收或放置，不得随意丢弃。离开后如有意见或问题，可统一反馈给陪同人员。

prompt.positive: 16:9 medium shot, clean room exit area with visitors removing and placing clean suits into a recycle bin, bright industrial overhead lighting, eye-level angle, photorealistic, highly detailed, 8K, industrial documentary style
prompt.negative: blurry, low quality, distorted faces, wrong proportions, text artifacts, watermark, logo, extra limbs, missing safety equipment, dark lighting, cluttered background

_video_prompt.prompt: style: Cinematic Realism v1, mood: cinematic, moody, controlled lighting, color palette: warm highlights, cool shadows. cinematic live-action video shot. scene: 洁净车间出口. 回收箱, 鞋套收集桶, 口罩回收筐, 出口标识, 洁净通道出口. lighting: 明亮白光，指示照明. character (visitor_group): hair fully covered by cleanroom cap, white cleanroom suit, mask, cleanroom shoes or shoe covers, visitor badge + no exposed personal items. prop (recycle_bin): state: available, visually consistent. prop (running_equipment): state: idle, visually consistent. Visitors follow a designated exit route, They place clean suits, shoe covers, and masks into a recycle bin. Narration: "参观结束后，请按指定路线离开洁净车间。洁净服、鞋套、口罩等按现场要求回收或放置，不得随意丢弃。离开后如有意见或问题，可统一反馈给陪同人员。". Camera motion: medium shot, subtle hand-held camera feel, focus on subject action. 16:9 medium shot, clean room exit area with visitors removing and placing clean suits into a recycle bin, bright industrial overhead lighting, eye-level angle, photorealistic, highly detailed, 8K, industrial documentary style. Shot-to-shot continuity: maintain identical character identity, scene layout, lighting and prop positions as established in previous shot. Visual style must match preceding frame. Do not introduce new visual elements not present in the reference images. Character identity locked to reference images. No face morphing or outfit variation.. Scene layout locked to context reference frame. Do not reposition props or alter lighting source.. All props match reference images exactly. Prop must_keep: shape, color, size, material unchanged.. Camera transition smooth from previous shot continuity frame. No abrupt jump cut between shots. Stable visual consistency across entire clip. No character drift, no prop mutation, no scene layout shift.
_video_prompt.negative: cartoon, neon cyberpunk (unless explicitly requested), 随意丢弃洁净用品, 逆向进入, blurry, low quality, distorted faces, wrong proportions, text artifacts, watermark, logo, extra limbs, missing safety equipment, dark lighting, cluttered background, multiple characters, duplicate person, clone, inconsistent lighting, wrong angle, lens distortion, chromatic aberration, face morphing, character drift, outfit change, prop mutation, scene layout shift, extra fingers, distorted limbs, text artifacts, burnt-in subtitles, logo, watermark, motion blur excessive, flickering, framing jump cut
_video_prompt.motion: medium shot, subtle hand-held camera feel, focus on subject action
_video_prompt.tool_hint: Copy "prompt" and "negative" into video generation tool. Upload "condition_images" for img2vid start/end frame conditioning if supported. "context_ref_images" are previous shot keyframes for visual continuity. Duration is a guideline.
